description: History/mystery documentary (the Samurai-in-Venice register): archival-led, object-anchored hooks, a chronology motif that returns, contemplative build.

visual.transition_bias: cut-led; dissolve only at era/location shifts

format.hook_rule: open on a CONCRETE object/document with an unanswered question attached ("a secret contained in these two letters") — never a thesis statement
recurring: a timeline motif returns each act, accumulating the events established so far
